scripts.name: Baseline Training (CartPole)

Overview: Train entropy-based policy on classic control (Time estimate: 5 hours for default settings).
Params: Environment = Gym env ID; Time Steps = rollout steps per policy; Training Steps = steps per episode; Episodes = episodes per epoch; Epochs = number of policies trained; Experiment Name = log/run name.
